description.en: The name of the Zstandard file. Equivalent to the name attribute of the underlying file object.

excerpt.es: The name of the Zstandard file. Equivalent to the name attribute of the underlying file object.
excerpt.en: The name of the Zstandard file. Equivalent to the name attribute of the underlying file object.

description.en: Select how many threads will be spawned to compress in parallel. When nb_workers > 0, enables multi-threaded compression, a value of 1 means “one-thread multi-threaded mode”. More workers improve speed, but also increase memory usage and slightly reduce compression ratio. A value of zero disables multi-threading.

description.en: False if the decompress() method can provide more decompressed data before requiring new compressed input.
